title: Hash Table with Chaining
description: Implement a hash table in C using separate chaining for collision resolution, with dynamic resizing and string keys.
requirements: Implement ht_set(ht, key, value) for insertion/update
Implement ht_get(ht, key) returning value or NULL
Implement ht_delete(ht, key) returning success bool
Use djb2 or similar hash function for strings

few_shot_examples.prompt: Create a linked list node for chaining.
